listing_notes: Phase B targeted rating grid. One scene per quota-high bucket; hand-written director prompt; ≤5 SKU candidates per bucket. Re-run scripts/build-router-table.ts after rating to emit a winning router-table. Seeded by scripts/seed-router-grid.ts.

buckets.director_prompt: Slow cinematic push into the kitchen island, following the granite countertop toward the window light.
buckets.rationale: Almadyde Ct kitchen, aesthetic 7.5, suggested_motion matches (push_in). Oliver has rated this listing's scenes before.

buckets.director_prompt: Smooth push-in toward the fireplace feature wall, past the sofa, revealing the coffered ceiling.
buckets.rationale: Macedonia Drive living room, aesthetic 9. Hero shot; premium SKU tested here.

buckets.director_prompt: Slow cinematic push toward the upholstered headboard, past the bench, centering on the bedroom window.
buckets.rationale: Prod property 6f508e16 master bedroom, aesthetic 8, suggested_motion push_in ✓. No master_bedroom photos in Lab corpus — importing the prod photo Oliver has already rated via scene_ratings.

buckets.director_prompt: Smooth push toward the front entry, past the landscaped walkway, revealing the double-height facade.
buckets.rationale: Macedonia Drive exterior_front, aesthetic 8.5, suggested_motion push_in ✓. Hero shot; premium + o3 baseline both tested.

buckets.director_prompt: Aerial drone push forward over the driveway, descending gently toward the roofline, revealing the property layout.
buckets.rationale: Macedonia Drive aerial, aesthetic 9, suggested_motion drone_push_in ✓. Includes runway (drone specialist per router.ts) + Phase 2.8 closest-to-winner kling-v3-pro.
